page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn5i-c16g1.4xlarge is a GPU-accelerated virtual machine instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 16 dedicated x86_64 vCPUs mapped to 16 physical cores, operating with a single thread per core. The instance is equipped with 64.0 GB of system memory, providing a balanced allocation of 4.0 GB per core.

Acceleration is delivered via a single NVIDIA P4 GPU with 8 GB of VRAM. This hardware configuration does not include local storage, meaning all storage requirements must be met through attached network storage volumes. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 3 Gbps.

The instance offers a cost-efficient entry point for GPU-accelerated workloads by utilizing the NVIDIA P4 architecture, which is suitable for lighter inference and media transcoding tasks rather than heavy double-precision compute. However, the lack of local storage and a baseline network speed of 3 Gbps are key architectural tradeoffs to consider when planning data-intensive pipelines. This server is suited for small-scale deep learning inference, video transcoding, and general-purpose workloads requiring GPU acceleration.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn5i-c16g1.4xlarge is a GPU-accelerated instance designed for workloads requiring dedicated compute resources and hardware acceleration. Running on the KVM hypervisor, it features 16 dedicated x86_64 vCPUs across 16 physical cores with one thread per core, paired with 64.0 GB of system memory. Graphics and compute acceleration are provided by a single NVIDIA P4 GPU with 8 GB of VRAM. The instance does not include local storage, relying entirely on network-attached storage, and provides a baseline network bandwidth of 3 Gbps. This hardware profile makes the instance a cost-effective option for entry-level GPU tasks, such as small-scale machine learning inference, video transcoding, and graphics rendering, where parallel processing is required without the premium cost of high-end accelerator architectures.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn5i-c16g1.4xlarge is a GPU-accelerated instance featuring 16 dedicated x86_64 vCPUs, 64 GB RAM, and a single NVIDIA P4 GPU with 8 GB VRAM for entry-level acceleration workloads.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn5i-c16g1.4xlarge features 16 dedicated vCPUs, 64 GB RAM, and an NVIDIA P4 GPU with 8 GB VRAM. Designed for GPU-accelerated tasks.
tagline: A GPU-accelerated virtual server featuring dedicated compute cores and an NVIDIA P4 accelerator for entry-level parallel processing workloads.

64.0 GB of system memory providing 4.0 GB per core

Suitable for entry-level machine learning inference and video transcoding
